Animate Dead  

Description

1: Summon Skeleton Pet: PCPetNecS04L020Skel2

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 200 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 10 Recast Time: 1.5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso animates an undead servant.

Game Description

Animates an undead servant from the remnants of the fallen. Consumes bone chips when cast.

Reagents

  • Bone Chips x 1

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Animate Dead
  • Spell: Animate Dead [Researched]

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Animate Dead
Spell: Animate Dead
ClassLevel
NEC20
SHD38
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (23)
  • Scroll 1 Sold By (8)
  • Scroll 2 Crafted (1)
  • NPCs with Ability (1)
  • Screenshots
  • Spell: Animate Dead - Research 62
Add Image
  • a kobold guardian - Nagafen's Lair

Merchants:


Abysmal Sea
  • Daris Rodril - 1pp 6gp 2sp 9cp

East Freeport
  • Malalon Morotia - 1pp 6gp 2sp 9cp

Grobb
  • Crilt - 1pp 6gp 2sp 9cp

Oggok
  • Crilt - 1pp 6gp 2sp 9cp

Paineel
  • Brettas Norval - 3pp 1gp 4sp 9cp

The Plane of Knowledge
  • Heretic Drahur - 1pp 6gp 2sp 9cp
  • Reaver Uledrith - 1pp 6gp 2sp 9cp

The Rathe Mountains
  • Scribe Vordangl - 3pp 1gp 4sp 9cp
Post Comment
Pet level
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2020 at 11:46 AM Rating: Good
UltimaOfMoo
Scholar
37 posts
Thanks to an update a while back that tells you the level of what you're considering, I can confirm that this pet is level 19
____________________________
Moo moomoo moo moo, moo moomoo moo!
▲ Page top
Decent Pet
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2017 at 3:16 PM Rating: Decent
Loyanna
Scholar
58 posts
I just picked up this pet on my SK on the TLP server, Phinigel.

He hits for 26 damage max.
He will double attack.
He will dual wield, but only with weapons.
He seems to triple attack quite a bit, but rarely, if ever quads. This tells me that it is high enough to double attack with his main hand, but not with his offhand.

Equip with a mage set (Phantom Plate, Fist of Ixiblat, Haste Mask and Stat Belt) it can take a few good hits, but is still pretty paper thin. Without the gear it dies VERY quickly. You need to really micromanage as a tank to make sure it's not getting hit.

Currently I do about 50-60 DPS with my Two-Handed sword, Reaver. The pet (with the mage weapons) adds about 8-15 DPS on most fights (upwards of 20-25 when the mage weapons proc).

All in all, this is a great upgrade for an SK who is looking for more DPS, just don't try and use it as an off tank!
▲ Page top
Animate Dead
QuoteReply
# Mar 14 2016 at 9:19 PM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
On current Progression servers (Ragefire/Lockjaw & Phinigel just in Kunark) some of the vendors for this spell are not presently in game.

I got the spell in Oggok off Crilt in the SK guildhall. This is pretty close to the bank, so nice for a spell mule if that is what you have to do.
▲ Page top
hi
QuoteReply
# Aug 15 2006 at 10:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1697415410975
Scholar
204 posts
for those of us on the progression servers, i FINALLY, after a few days, found a copy of this spell. simply make a new erudite necro character, go to the shadow knight guild in paineel, and buy Animate Dead from Sherakas Melaku. 3pp 1 gold with 95 CHA and amiable faction.

when you enter the shadow knight guild make a left, and its the door on the right.

▲ Page top

# Aug 20 2006 at 8:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592790801765
View User Forum
9 posts
Also for you progression fans. This spell is confirmed on Combine at another location. Crilt in Oggok, the SK Spell vendor. 3p 7g 5s with a lvl. 1 Ogre SK - CHA of 62.

It's a bummer that you have to do work arounds for this kind of thing but progression is so worth it. :)

RE: class?
QuoteReply
# Dec 25 2004 at 2:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592268868250
102 posts
all pets from 1-49 in the necro class (other then charmed ones) are pure melee warriors. you dont get a non warrior pet tell 53 when you get the first rogue pet.
▲ Page top
Dual wield
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2004 at 12:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802751780
12 posts
Necro pet at 29 dual weilds, 16th lvl pet gains double attack which looks like dual weild opposed to pet that doesnt double attack. Not duel weild, that would imply that your pet holds his weapon differently when defending his honor in a duel as opposed to him holding 2 weapons which is dual weilding, duel = fight, dual = 2
▲ Page top
duel wield
QuoteReply
# Jan 27 2004 at 2:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798028634
2 posts
I believe necro pets get dw at level 29.. could be mistaken though
▲ Page top
RE: duel wield
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2004 at 9:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263224912
17 posts
my lvl 16 pet duel wields /shrug. Tried last night and sure enough he did=)
▲ Page top
RE: duel wield
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2004 at 11:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592259328552
25 posts
You are correct. The level 29 pet does not dual wield on it's own though, you have to give it 2 1 handed weapons to use dual wield. Every pet after 29 will dual without giving it weapons.
▲ Page top

Getting spells from Cabalis (or anywhere else) is easy now... just buy the spell with a newbie iksar, put it in your shared bank, log your "main" in, and viola.
